name: python3-gensim
title: python3-gensim
summary: Python framework for fast Vector Space Modelling
description:
Python framework for fast Vector Space Modelling
Gensim is a Python library for topic modelling, document indexing
and similarity retrieval with large corpora. The target audience
is the natural language processing (NLP) and information retrieval
(IR) community.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gensim because Python framework for fast Vector Space Modelling.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gensim as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gensim with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gensim --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
